Hero.title: Matheus Mortari
Hero.subtitle: Full-stack developer
Hero.description: Welcome to my website, where you can learn about my work. Feel free to explore and connect!

About.title: About Me
About.section1: I am a full-stack web developer and Systems Analysis & Development student at the University of Passo Fundo (UPF), based in Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil. Through my studies and project work, I have specialized in creating clean, responsive user interfaces, along with robust back-end systems such as RESTful APIs and databases. I have optimized my development workflow by employing custom tooling and automation processes.
About.section2: I'm easily adaptable and committed to staying updated on the industry trends, while also maintaining a foundation in traditional and reliable technologies. Beyond web development, I enjoy exploring themes such as software architecture, automation, and cloud computing. I'm passionate about many topics such as music and reading, and I'm open to learning through engaging experiences.
About.section3: Feel free to explore my work, and don't hesitate to reach out — I'm always seeking to connect, learn and collaborate!
